encounter.reason: Lab results review, rheumatology referral confirmation
encounter.location: Alamo Family Practice, San Antonio, TX

medications.name: ibuprofen 400 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: take 400 mg by mouth as needed for joint pain and stiffness
medications.reason: suspected rheumatoid arthritis — joint pain and stiffness

document_references.description: Documentation of Dr. Tran's telephone call with Carlos Medina to review laboratory results from 2021-02-08 (significantly elevated RF, strongly positive anti-CCP, elevated ESR and CRP, normal CBC/BMP/LFTs), explain their clinical significance as strongly suggestive of rheumatoid arthritis, confirm the rheumatology referral to South Texas Rheumatology with appointment scheduled for 2021-03-15, and advise continuation of ibuprofen PRN with instructions to call if symptoms worsen.
